pageDescription: Calculate loan payments, interest rates, and payoff schedules for various types of loans including mortgages, auto loans, and personal loans

amortization.title: Amortization
amortization.description: Process of paying off a loan with regular payments over time

interest.title: Interest Calculation
interest.description: Interest is calculated on the remaining loan balance, decreasing over time

extraPayments.title: Extra Payments
extraPayments.description: Extra payments reduce principal faster, saving on total interest

criticalWarningsList.notDiagnostic: This calculator provides loan payment estimates only
criticalWarningsList.actual: Actual loan terms may vary based on lender policies and fees

importantNotesList: This calculator does not include taxes, insurance, or other fees
Extra payments directly reduce the principal balance
Bi-weekly payments can help pay off loans faster
Consider the annual percentage rate (APR) for true loan cost

messages.enterInformation: Enter your loan information to calculate payments and interest
messages.resultMessage: Your loan calculation results are shown below

disclaimer.title: Important Disclaimer
disclaimer.content: This calculator provides loan payment estimates based on standard financial formulas. Actual loan terms, payments, and interest may vary based on lender policies, fees, and other factors not included in these calculations.

seekHelp.title: Financial Resources
seekHelp.content: For personalized loan advice and financial planning, consult financial advisors or loan officers with expertise in lending products and individual financial circumstances.

errors.extraPayment: Please enter a valid extra payment amount
errors.loanTermUnit: Please select a loan term unit

tooltips.loanTerm: Length of time to repay the loan
